'''√ng-y-zh''' ('''ngayazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jook|jook]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jook|jook]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-y-zh
|-
! Lemma
| ngayazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayazhithi|ngayazhithi]] || [[word:ngayazhiji|ngayazhiji]] || [[word:ngayazhishi|ngayazhishi]] || [[word:ngayazhi|ngayazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayazhuthuth|ngayazhuthuth]] || [[word:ngayazhujuj|ngayazhujuj]] || [[word:ngayazhushush|ngayazhushush]] || [[word:ngayazh|ngayazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayazhuthu|ngayazhuthu]] || [[word:ngayazhuju|ngayazhuju]] || [[word:ngayazhushu|ngayazhushu]] || [[word:ngayazhu|ngayazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayazhufuth|ngayazhufuth]] || [[word:ngayazhufuj|ngayazhufuj]] || [[word:ngayazhufush|ngayazhufush]] || [[word:ngayazhuf|ngayazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayazhethe|ngayazhethe]] || [[word:ngayazheje|ngayazheje]] || [[word:ngayazheshe|ngayazheshe]] || [[word:ngayazhe|ngayazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayazhothoth|ngayazhothoth]] || [[word:ngayazhojoj|ngayazhojoj]] || [[word:ngayazhoshosh|ngayazhoshosh]] || [[word:ngayazh|ngayazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayazhotho|ngayazhotho]] || [[word:ngayazhojo|ngayazhojo]] || [[word:ngayazhosho|ngayazhosho]] || [[word:ngayazho|ngayazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayazhofoth|ngayazhofoth]] || [[word:ngayazhofoj|ngayazhofoj]] || [[word:ngayazhofosh|ngayazhofosh]] || [[word:ngayazhof|ngayazhof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayazhïfïf|ngayazhïfïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïfïf|ngayazhïfïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïfïf|ngayazhïfïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïfïf|ngayazhïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]] || [[word:ngayazhïf|ngayazhïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayazhæthæ|ngayazhæthæ]] || [[word:ngayazhæjæ|ngayazhæjæ]] || [[word:ngayazhæshæ|ngayazhæshæ]] || [[word:ngayazhæ|ngayazhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayazhathath|ngayazhathath]] || [[word:ngayazhajaj|ngayazhajaj]] || [[word:ngayazhashash|ngayazhashash]] || [[word:ngayazh|ngayazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayazhatha|ngayazhatha]] || [[word:ngayazhaja|ngayazhaja]] || [[word:ngayazhasha|ngayazhasha]] || [[word:ngayazha|ngayazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayazhafath|ngayazhafath]] || [[word:ngayazhafaj|ngayazhafaj]] || [[word:ngayazhafash|ngayazhafash]] || [[word:ngayazhaf|ngayazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngayazhasha|ngayazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongayazhasha|gongayazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingayazhasha|gokingayazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngayazhnüsha|ngayazhnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongayazhnknüsha|gongayazhnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingayazhnüsha|gokingayazhnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngayazhshësha|ngayazhshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongayazhnkshësha|gongayazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingayazhshësha|gokingayazhshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayazhrosha|ngayazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayazhnkrosha|gongayazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayazhrosha|gokingayazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayazhmusha|ngayazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayazhnkmusha|gongayazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayazhmusha|gokingayazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngayazhsherasha|ngayazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongayazhnksherasha|gongayazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingayazhsherasha|gokingayazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngayazhngasha|ngayazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongayazhnkngasha|gongayazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingayazhngasha|gokingayazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngayazhyasha|ngayazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongayazhnkyasha|gongayazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingayazhyasha|gokingayazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngayazhyamasha|ngayazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongayazhnkyamasha|gongayazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingayazhyamasha|gokingayazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngayazhnüshësha|ngayazhnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongayazhnknüshësha|gongayazhnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingayazhnüshësha|gokingayazhnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayazhnürosha|ngayazhnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayazhnknürosha|gongayazhnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayazhnürosha|gokingayazhnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayazhnümusha|ngayazhnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayazhnknümusha|gongayazhnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayazhnümusha|gokingayazhnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngayazhshënüsha|ngayazhshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongayazhnkshënüsha|gongayazhnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingayazhshënüsha|gokingayazhshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayazhshërosha|ngayazhshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayazhnkshërosha|gongayazhnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayazhshërosha|gokingayazhshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayazhshëmusha|ngayazhshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayazhnkshëmusha|gongayazhnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayazhshëmusha|gokingayazhshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngayazhronüsha|ngayazhronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongayazhnkronüsha|gongayazhnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingayazhronüsha|gokingayazhronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngayazhroshësha|ngayazhroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongayazhnkroshësha|gongayazhnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingayazhroshësha|gokingayazhroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayazhromusha|ngayazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayazhnkromusha|gongayazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayazhromusha|gokingayazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngayazhmunüsha|ngayazhmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongayazhnkmunüsha|gongayazhnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingayazhmunüsha|gokingayazhmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngayazhmushësha|ngayazhmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongayazhnkmushësha|gongayazhnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingayazhmushësha|gokingayazhmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayazhmurosha|ngayazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayazhnkmurosha|gongayazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayazhmurosha|gokingayazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngayazh|ngayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ngæyæzh|ngæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongayazh|hongayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hongæyæzh|hongæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongayazh|hohongayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongæyæzh|hohongæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüngayazh|nüngayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüngæyæzh|nüngæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nününgayazh|nününgayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nününgæyæzh|nününgæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïngayazh|nïngayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïngæyæzh|nïngæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïngayazh|nïnïngayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïngæyæzh|nïnïngæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungayazh|lungayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lungæyæzh|lungæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungayazh|lulungayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungæyæzh|lulungæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingayazh|lingayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lingæyæzh|lingæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingayazh|lilingayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingæyæzh|lilingæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongayazh|kongayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kongæyæzh|kongæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongayazh|kokongayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongæyæzh|kokongæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengayazh|kengayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kengæyæzh|kengæyæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengayazh|kekengayazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengæyæzh|kekengæyæzh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
